title: Baked Chicken Drumsticks & Roasted Veggies
description: A simple and delicious one-pan meal featuring tender chicken drumsticks and colorful roasted vegetables, perfect for a family dinner. Minimal cleanup and kid-friendly flavors make this a weeknight favorite.
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper for easy cleanup.
Wash and chop potatoes and carrots into 1-inch pieces. In a large bowl, toss the chopped vegetables with 1 tablespoon of olive oil, salt, and pepper.
In a separate bowl, toss the chicken drumsticks with the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil, garlic powder, paprika, oregano, salt, and pepper.
Arrange the seasoned chicken drumsticks and vegetables in a single layer on the prepared baking sheet, ensuring not to overcrowd the pan. If necessary, use two baking sheets.

Bake for 20 minutes. Then, add the broccoli florets to the baking sheet and continue baking for another 10-15 minutes, or until chicken is cooked through (internal temperature of 165°F/74°C) and vegetables are tender and slightly caramelized.
Remove from oven and let rest for a few minutes before serving.
tips: For crispier chicken skin, pat the drumsticks dry with paper towels before seasoning.
Feel free to customize the vegetables based on what your family enjoys or what you have on hand, such as bell peppers, zucchini, or sweet potatoes.
If you have picky eaters, you can serve a small portion of plain chicken and veggies before adding sauces or extra seasonings to their plates.
